chunks.title: Yahweh's Instruction and Moses' Warning
chunks.reason: Moses delivers a unified warning to Pharaoh about the coming locust plague.

chunks.title: Negotiation with Pharaoh
chunks.reason: A back-and-forth exchange between Pharaoh's servants, Pharaoh, and Moses regarding who will go.

chunks.title: The Plague of Locusts
chunks.reason: Narrative account of the locusts arriving, consuming the land, and Pharaoh's temporary plea.

chunks.title: The Plague of Darkness
chunks.reason: Narrative account of the three days of darkness and the distinction for Israel.

chunks.title: Final Negotiation and Departure
chunks.reason: The final negotiation over livestock and Moses' declaration to leave Pharaoh.
